title: DocSpec
description: DocSpec v3.0.0 — A machine-readable specification for documenting software artifacts.

modules.description: The modules that compose this artifact.

flows.description: Business or technical flows described by this artifact.

contexts.description: Contextual narratives attached to modules or flows.

crossRefs.description: Cross-references between artifacts, flows, steps, and members.

errors.description: Known error codes and their descriptions.

events.description: Events published or consumed by this artifact.

dataModels.description: Data models (entities, DTOs, value objects) discovered in this artifact.

dataStores.description: Data stores (databases, caches, message brokers) used by this artifact.

configuration.description: Configuration properties consumed by this artifact.

externalDependencies.description: External services and APIs consumed by this artifact.

privacy.description: Privacy-sensitive fields and their handling policies.

intentGraph.description: DSTI intent graph extracted from source code analysis.

Artifact.description: Identification and build metadata for the documented artifact.

groupId.description: The group or organisation identifier (e.g. Maven groupId).

language.description: Primary programming language (e.g. java, kotlin, python).

sourceUrl.description: URL template or base URL for browsing source files.

buildTool.description: Build tool used (e.g. maven, gradle, sbt).

frameworks.description: Frameworks detected or declared (e.g. spring-boot, quarkus).

homepage.description: URL of the project homepage or documentation site.

license.description: SPDX license identifier or license name.

Module.description: A logical module or component within the artifact.

since.description: Version in which this module was introduced.

framework.description: Framework that contributed this module (null if none).

members.description: Classes, interfaces, enums, records, and annotations in this module.

Member.description: A type-level member (class, interface, enum, record, annotation) within a module.

kindCategory.description: Semantic category of this member based on its role or type.

qualified.description: Fully qualified name of the type.

since.description: Version in which this member was introduced.

deprecated.description: Deprecation notice, or null if not deprecated.

tags.description: Freeform tags associated with this member.

extends.description: Qualified name of the superclass, or null.

values.description: Enum constant names (only applicable when kind is enum).

dependencies.description: Dependencies injected or required by this member.

MemberDependency.description: A dependency injected into or required by a member.

name.description: Field or parameter name of the dependency.

Method.description: A method declared within a member type.

since.description: Version in which this method was introduced.

deprecated.description: Deprecation notice, or null if not deprecated.

tags.description: Freeform tags associated with this method.

endpointMapping.description: HTTP endpoint mapping if this method is a web endpoint, or null.

returnWrapper.description: Wrapper type for async return value.

async.description: Async execution details for this method.

errorConditions.description: Error conditions that this method can produce.

MethodErrorCondition.description: An error condition that a method can produce.

description.description: Description of when this error occurs.

code.description: Application error code associated with this condition.

MethodParam.description: A parameter of a method or constructor.

default.description: Default value, or null if none.

Field.description: A field declared within a member type.

since.description: Version in which this field was introduced.

Constructor.description: A constructor declared within a member type.

title.description: Title or caption for the example.

language.description: Programming language of the code snippet.

verified.description: Whether this example has been verified to compile/run.

sourceFile.description: Path to the source file from which this example was extracted.

ReferencedBy.description: Back-references indicating where this member is used.

endpoints.description: Endpoint paths that reference this member.

flows.description: Flow IDs that reference this member.

contexts.description: Context IDs that reference this member.

EndpointMapping.description: HTTP endpoint mapping for a web-exposed method.

Flow.description: A business or technical flow composed of ordered steps.

trigger.description: What triggers this flow (e.g. HTTP request, scheduled job, event).

steps.description: Ordered steps that compose this flow.

FlowStep.description: A single step within a flow.

id.description: Unique identifier for this step within the flow.

actor.description: Simple name of the class or component performing this step.

actorQualified.description: Fully qualified name of the actor.

description.description: Description of what happens in this step.

ai.description: Whether this step involves AI/ML processing.

retryTarget.description: Step ID to retry on failure, or null.

dataStoreOps.description: Data store operations performed in this step.

configDependencies.description: Configuration property keys consumed by this step.

FlowStepDataStoreOp.description: A data store operation performed within a flow step.

FlowStepObservability.description: Observability instrumentation for a flow step.

logLevel.description: Expected log level for this step.

Context.description: A contextual narrative that explains how a module, flow, or feature works.

attachedTo.description: ID of the module, flow, or member this context is attached to.

flow.description: Narrative text describing the flow of this context.

uses.description: Artifacts and capabilities used in this context.

ContextInput.description: An input described within a context.

items.description: Sub-items or fields within this input.

ContextUses.description: A reference to an artifact or capability used within a context.

artifact.description: Identifier of the artifact being used.

what.description: What is being used from the artifact.

CrossRef.description: A cross-reference linking elements across artifacts.

sourceQualified.description: Fully qualified name of the source element.

targetStep.description: ID of the target step within the target flow.

targetMember.description: Qualified name of the target member.

Error.description: A documented error code and its metadata.

httpStatus.description: HTTP status code associated with this error.

exception.description: Qualified name of the exception class.

thrownBy.description: Qualified names of methods that throw this error.

endpoints.description: Endpoint paths where this error may occur.

since.description: Version in which this error was introduced.

Event.description: An event published or consumed by the artifact.

since.description: Version in which this event was introduced.

EventPayload.description: The payload schema of an event.

type.description: Qualified type name of the payload class.

EventPayloadField.description: A field within an event payload.

DataModel.description: A data model (entity, DTO, value object) discovered in the artifact.

name.description: Simple name of the data model.

qualified.description: Fully qualified name of the data model.

table.description: Database table name mapped to this model.

discoveredFrom.description: How this data model was discovered.

endpoints.description: Endpoint paths that use this data model.

repositories.description: Repository classes that manage this data model.

usedBy.description: Where this data model is used.

unique.description: Whether this is a unique index.

indexes.description: Database indexes for this data model.

DataModelField.description: A field within a data model.

primaryKey.description: Whether this field is a primary key.

nullable.description: Whether this field allows null values.

unique.description: Whether this field has a unique constraint.

enumType.description: Enum type if this field maps to an enum.

generated.description: Whether this field value is auto-generated (e.g. sequences, UUIDs).

onDelete.description: ON DELETE action (e.g. CASCADE, SET NULL, RESTRICT).

maxLength.description: Maximum character length for string fields.

target.description: Qualified name of the target data model.

field.description: Field name that holds this relationship.

mappedBy.description: Field on the inverse side that owns the relationship.

JsonShape.description: The JSON serialization shape of a data model.

fields.description: Fields as they appear in JSON serialization.

JsonShapeField.description: A field within a JSON shape.

name.description: Field name in the JSON output.

jsonProperty.description: Explicit JSON property name (if different from the field name).

enum.description: Allowed enum values for this field.

DataStore.description: A data store (database, cache, message broker) used by the artifact.

id.description: Unique identifier for this data store.

tables.description: Tables or collections in this store.

DataStoreMigration.description: A schema migration for a data store.

description.description: Description of what this migration does.

DataStoreKeyPattern.description: A key pattern for key-value stores.

type.description: Value type stored at this key.

ttl.description: Time-to-live for keys matching this pattern.

description.description: Description of what this key pattern stores.

DataStoreBucket.description: A bucket in an object store.

keyPattern.description: Key pattern used within this bucket.

description.description: Description of what this bucket stores.

DataStoreTopic.description: A topic in a message broker.

schema.description: Qualified name of the message schema type.

ConfigurationProperty.description: A configuration property consumed by the artifact.

type.description: Java type of the property value.

default.description: Default value, or null if required.

usedBy.description: Qualified names of classes that use this property.

affectsFlow.description: Flow IDs affected by this property.

validRange.description: Valid range constraints for numeric properties.

affectsStep.description: Flow step ID directly affected by this property.

ValidRange.description: Valid range constraints for a configuration property.

SecurityEndpointRule.description: Security rule for a specific endpoint.

public.description: Whether this endpoint is publicly accessible.

ExternalDependency.description: An external service or API consumed by the artifact.

rateLimit.description: Rate limit of the external service.

fallback.description: Fallback strategy when the dependency is unavailable.

ExternalDependencyEndpoint.description: An endpoint consumed from an external dependency.

usedBy.description: Qualified names of methods that call this endpoint.

traces.description: Trace spans defined in the artifact.

ObservabilityMetric.description: A metric emitted by the artifact.

emittedBy.description: Qualified names of methods that emit this metric.

ObservabilityTrace.description: A trace span defined in the artifact.

PrivacyField.description: A privacy-sensitive field and its handling policy.

encrypted.description: Whether this field is encrypted at rest.

neverLog.description: Whether this field must never appear in logs.

neverReturn.description: Whether this field must never be returned in API responses.

maskedInResponses.description: Whether this field is masked (not removed) in API responses.

IntentGraph.description: DSTI intent graph extracted from source code analysis.

IntentMethod.description: A method with extracted intent signals.

IntentSignals.description: Intent signals extracted from a method's source code.

verb.description: Primary verb extracted from method name.

nameSemantics.description: Semantics extracted from the method name.

guardClauses.description: Guard clauses detected — count or structured objects.

branches.description: Conditional branches — count or structured objects.

constants.description: Constants used — simple names or structured objects.

dependencies.description: Dependencies — simple names or structured objects.

contractChecks.description: Contract method checks (equals, hashCode, compareTo, toString).

output.description: Output or effect of this branch.

implies.description: What this constant implies about the method's intent.

Discovery.description: Metadata about how the documentation was discovered and generated.

excludedPackages.description: Packages that were excluded from scanning.

documentedClasses.description: Number of classes included in documentation.

annotatedClasses.description: Number of classes discovered via annotations.

documentedMethods.description: Number of methods included in documentation.

totalParams.description: Total number of method parameters found.
